title: Character Pack
description: A reference-led four-image series that keeps one cute character identity stable while packaging, props, and retail emphasis evolve.
creative_direction: Use one anchor character package visual as the reference, then vary packaging scale, merchandising language, and supporting props while preserving silhouette and charm.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01-reference-mascot-pack first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for the remaining series images. Queue may run the dependent images concurrently after the reference is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Character Pack
en.description: A reference-led four-image series that keeps one cute character identity stable while packaging, props, and retail emphasis evolve.

zh-CN.title: 角色包装系列
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖同一角色基准图的系列研究，在身份稳定的前提下切换包装、道具和零售表达。
